name: Suggesting new definition(s) or improving existing ones

title: New/edited definition suggestion for <LIST TERM(S) HERE>

---

<!--
Thanks for contributing!

This template can be used to:
- suggest one or more new terms,
- suggest additional definitions for existing terms,
- improve existing definitions.

If you have several definitions to contribute, simply repeat the "Term" and
"Definition" sections below as many times as needed.
-->

## Term

<!--
Which word or phrase are you defining?

Example:
Weather
-->

---

## Is this...

<!-- Tick one or more. -->

- [ ] A new term
- [ ] An additional definition for an existing term
- [ ] An improvement to an existing definition

---

## Definition

<!--
Write your definition below.

We're aiming for the **Up-Goer Five** style:
use only the thousand most common English words where possible.

Don't worry if it isn't perfect—multiple definitions for the same term are encouraged!
-->

```
Your definition goes here.
```

---

## Optional image

<!--
If you'd like an image to appear with this term, either:

- attach it to this issue,
- provide a link to it, or
- suggest an existing image already in the repository.

Please only suggest images that are free to reuse (or that you created yourself).

Good sources include:
- NCAS Flickr 'Inclusive Image Library':
  https://ncas.ac.uk/for-staff/inclusive-image-library/
- Unsplash:
  https://unsplash.com/

If you're unsure about an image's licence, please mention where it came from
and we can look into this.
-->

## Anything else?

<!--
Any notes, context, or why you think this definition is useful.
